global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'PixelForge' logo positioned at the top left. The main subject includes a prominent headline 'Beat your rivals' and supporting body text 'No ads in first week' centered in the middle. A 'Claim reward' button is located at the bottom center, encouraging user interaction. Decorative elements enhance the visual appeal without distracting from the main message.
global.visual_style: Modern design with vibrant colors and clear typography
global.main_message: Encouragement to engage with the game by highlighting a promotional offer.

elements.description: Supporting descriptive text below the headline.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for PixelForge Legends promoting engagement with a competitive theme.
